arts.ttl: Preview, Squad List, Team News: Real Madrid vs. Sevilla; Liga F
arts.sum: As for availability, Athenea del Castillo joins the squad list. Las Blancas sit in third place with 2 points behind second-placed Atlético Madrid, with 2 games in hand.

arts.ttl: Team News: Girona vs. Real Madrid injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Saturday's La Liga clash between Girona and Real Madrid.

arts.ttl: Cristiano Ronaldo's Al-Nassr suffer dramatic loss to Al-Ittihad as ex-Spurs star nets stoppage-time winner - after Portuguese superstar earlier traded goals with former Real Madrid team-mate
arts.sum: Ronaldo popped up two minutes after Al-Ittihad had taken the lead with a goal of his own. Ultimately, though, it would be in vein, with a late goal meaning his opponents took all three points.

arts.ttl: Video: Cristiano Ronaldo reunited with fellow Real Madrid legend in Saudi Arabia
arts.sum: Footage no doubt set to bring a collective smile to the faces of Real Madrid supporters the world over has surfaced online on Friday. The clip in question stems from…

arts.ttl: ‘Ready to listen’ – Fresh twist in the Alphonso Davies-Real Madrid saga
arts.sum: A fresh twist has on Friday been noted in the long-time saga, linking Bayern Munich star Alphonso Davies with a move to Spain with Real Madrid. This comes amid confirmation…

arts.ttl: Pedja Mijatovic Critiques Real Madrid’s Mentality, Hunger, and Leadership
arts.sum: Pedja Mijatovic highlights the team’s mental fragility, loss of hunger, and Mbappe’s struggles under pressure, calling for a shift in leadership and approach under Carlo Ancelotti. The main problem this season is precisely the team’s greatest virtue of last year, this mental strength.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid star ‘in the plans’ of Premier League outfit Bournemouth
arts.sum: A member of the defensive ranks at La Liga giants Real Madrid has made his way onto the radar of the transfer team at Bournemouth. That’s according to Relevo, who…

arts.ttl: 1 in, 5 out: Real Madrid name squad for Girona clash
arts.sum: La Liga champions Real Madrid have on Friday unveiled the club’s travelling squad for their upcoming meeting with Girona. Carlo Ancelotti’s troops are of course primed to return to action…

arts.ttl: Real Madrid eye TRIPLE Liverpool swoop
arts.sum: Liverpool defender Trent Alexander-Arnold is one of their preferred transfer targets and the Englishman is widely expected to seal a free transfer move to the Santiago Bernabeu when his contract at Anfield expires at the end of June. Real Madrid are reportedly hoping to sign three Liverpool players in 2025 as they look to bolster Carlo Ancelotti’s first-team squad.

arts.ttl: Carlo Ancelotti Confirms Vinicius Junior Return Date
arts.sum: Vinícius Júnior could make his return for Real Madrid against Atalanta, per Carlo Ancelotti.
